controls.title: Repository README exists and explains purpose

evidence.observation: README contains service purpose, local setup, validation commands and support ownership.

controls.title: Required CI checks are represented in workflows

evidence.observation: Node lint and test commands are defined with pinned checkout and setup actions.
Python test command is defined with dependency installation and reproducible runner configuration.

controls.title: Release evidence is available before release recommendation

evidence.observation: Agent evidence links implementation, validation and residual risk.
Conformance matrix records control status and evidence references.

controls.title: Accessibility evidence is present where UI is in scope

evidence.observation: Automated and manual evidence present. One low-severity defect is closed.

warning.message: Manual assistive technology checks should be repeated before production release if UI changes after this evidence was captured.

recommendation.next_action: Open pull request for review after changed-file verification and CI completion.
recommendation.release_reason: This payload describes conformance readiness only. Release requires a separate release-gate report.

meta.purpose: Expanded successful JSON response fixture for realistic GitHub Diamond API examples.
meta.notes: This payload is intentionally representative rather than minimal. It demonstrates status, request metadata, evidence-bearing data, links and release boundary language.
